response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 20 years of software development experience with strong alignment to the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes. His most recent role at re:cinq directly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, which maps cleanly to the job's AI agent development requirement. His TDD advocacy, testing library authorship (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and testing workshop facilitation signal the kind of quality culture the role expects. The notable gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, no Kotlin in the skill set (Java appears only in older embedded/tooling contexts), and a career gap since October 2025 that warrants clarification.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure experience from re:cinq maps precisely to the job's AI agent development requirement
Broad TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack history backed by cloud (AWS CDK) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) across multiple production roles
Deep, demonstrated testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of two testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and organizer of recurring testing workshops and dojos
concerns: Nest.js — the primary backend framework in the job spec — is absent from the resume despite extensive Node.js experience
Kotlin is not listed anywhere; Java appears only in older robotic-arm and mobile-orchestration contexts, making the secondary stack requirement uncertain
Career gap since October 2025 is unexplained and the immediately preceding re:cinq tenure was only six months, both of which need clarification
